_meta.role: 不列顛城博物館（@oddities 奇珍館）館長，戴左手皮手套，原為訓鷹師（falconer），由不列顛王任命為館長；介紹館中展品（巨石碑、能量場、永動之機、Zog 之骨、奧泉、龍頭翼蛋）；告別時會發出貓似的呼嚕聲（致敬其名 Kytyn=kitten 諧音）。

translations.en: Kytyn
translations.zh: 凱婷
translations.note: 人名音譯；Kytyn 諧音 kitten（小貓）

translations.en: a slender woman wearing a leather glove on her left hand.
translations.zh: 一名纖瘦的女子，左手戴著一隻皮手套。

translations.en: "Hello and welcome, $G!"
translations.zh: 「您好，$G，歡迎光臨！」

translations.en: name
translations.zh: name

translations.en: "My name is Kytyn." She smiles. "Perhaps that explains why I like @birds."
translations.zh: 「我是凱婷。」她微笑道，「這大概便是我愛@birds（飛禽）的原因。」

translations.en: glov,bird
translations.zh: glov,bird

translations.en: "I used to be a @falconer."
translations.zh: 「我從前是@falconer（訓鷹）師。」

translations.en: falc
translations.zh: falc

translations.en: "That was before Lord @British appointed me to my current position."
translations.zh: 「那是在不列顛@British（不列顛王）命我擔任此職之前。」
translations.note: @British→@王（內部觸發 brit 保留 ASCII）

translations.en: lord,brit
translations.zh: lord,brit

translations.en: "A true gentleman if ever I saw one."
translations.zh: 「真是我所見過最有風範的紳士。」

translations.en: job,appo,posi
translations.zh: job,appo,posi

translations.en: "I'm the curator of the royal @museum of @oddities."
translations.zh: 「我是王家@museum（奇珍）@oddities（博物）館之館長。」

translations.en: roya,muse
translations.zh: roya,muse

translations.en: "It's just one of the @projects Lord British has funded to provide a better life for his people."
translations.zh: 「這只是不列顛王為謀百姓福祉所資助的@projects（志業）之一。」

translations.en: proj,fund,bett,life
translations.zh: proj,fund,bett,life

translations.en: "He also established the @conservatory that shares the building with the museum."
translations.zh: 「陛下亦設立@conservatory（音樂院），與博物館共用此樓。」

translations.en: "The @roads that span the realm are his doing as well."
translations.zh: 「橫貫此境的@roads（道路）亦是他所興建。」

translations.en: cons,shar,buil
translations.zh: cons,shar,buil

translations.en: "Sometimes I can hear their @music drifting through the walls..."
translations.zh: 「有時可聽見@music（樂聲）穿牆而過…」

translations.en: "Usually that noisy, crackling field drowns it out, though."
translations.zh: 「但通常被那嘈雜霹啪作響的能量場掩沒了。」

translations.en: musi,drif,hear
translations.zh: musi,drif,hear

translations.en: "It's very pretty."
translations.zh: 「十分動聽。」

translations.en: road,real,netw
translations.zh: road,real,netw

translations.en: "@Travel is much easier these days."
translations.zh: 「@Travel（旅行）近來輕鬆多了。」

translations.en: trav
translations.zh: trav

translations.en: "That's for sure."
translations.zh: 「確實如此。」

translations.en: cura,odd
translations.zh: cura,odd

translations.en: "I can tell you more about any of the @exhibits you're interested in."
translations.zh: 「汝若對任何@exhibits（展品）有興趣，我可詳述。」

translations.en: exhi,inte
translations.zh: exhi,inte

translations.en: "We have the @monolith, the @energy field, the perpetual motion @machine, the @bones of Zog, the mystery @fountain, and the @dragon's head, wings, and egg."*
translations.zh: 「我們有@monolith（巨石）碑、@energy（能量）場、永動之@machine（機）、Zog 的@bones（骨骸）、奧@fountain（泉），以及@dragon（巨龍）的頭、翼、與蛋。」*
translations.note: @monolith→@巨石碑；@energy→@能量；@machine→@機；@bones→@骨骸；@fountain→@泉；@dragon→@龍；保留 Zog 不譯與末 *

translations.en: "Which one were you curious about?"
translations.zh: 「汝對何者感興趣？」

translations.en: bone,zog
translations.zh: bone,zog

translations.en: "This skeleton seems to be about ten times older than any other ever found in Britannia."
translations.zh: 「此骸骨看來比不列顛尼亞其他遺骨皆要古老十倍。」

translations.en: "Surely it has much to tell us about our origins, if we only knew what it meant!"
translations.zh: 「它必有諸多吾人起源之祕可告，倘吾人能解其意！」

translations.en: drag,head,wing,egg
translations.zh: drag,head,wing,egg

translations.en: "Someone named '@Gertan' donated all those parts."
translations.zh: 「一位名為『@Gertan（葛爾）坦』者捐獻了所有部位。」

translations.en: "I think he said something about a dragon named 'Freitag'."
translations.zh: 「他似乎提到一條名為『弗瑞塔』的龍。」

translations.en: gert,frei
translations.zh: gert,frei

translations.en: "If you want to ask Gertan, I think he's in Cove."
translations.zh: 「汝若欲詢葛爾坦，我想他在海灣鎮。」

translations.en: myst,foun
translations.zh: myst,foun

translations.en: "Somebody found a huge boulder with a jet of water spraying out of it."
translations.zh: 「有人尋得一塊巨岩，其中噴湧出一股水柱。」

translations.en: *"We had it magically teleported here, buried with its surface flush with the ground, and then we built this building on top of it."
translations.zh: *「我們以法術將之傳送至此，將表面與地面齊平埋下，再於其上建此樓。」

translations.en: "Of course we left a hole in the floor for the water to spray through."
translations.zh: 「當然，地面留有一孔讓水柱噴湧而出。」

translations.en: "I often drink from it when I'm thirsty. The water is quite good, but there's something strange about it."
translations.zh: 「我口渴時常飲此水。水質甚佳，但有些古怪之處。」

translations.en: "It vanishes somehow before it hits the ground..."
translations.zh: 「水在落地前便不知所終地消失了…」

translations.en: perp,moti,mach,gear
translations.zh: perp,moti,mach,gear

translations.en: "That's a very curious device. The motion of each gear turns another, until eventually the movement is propagated back to the same gear again."
translations.zh: 「那是極奇妙的裝置。每一齒輪之動帶轉另一輪，運動終又傳回最初的齒輪。」

translations.en: "There's one thing I can't figure out."
translations.zh: 「有一事我始終想不通。」

translations.en: "We've made plans of the device, and I can't see how they started it moving in the first place."
translations.zh: 「我們已繪此裝置之圖，卻看不出當初是如何使其動起來的。」

translations.en: "None of the gears would turn unless all the others were already going."
translations.zh: 「除非其餘齒輪皆已在動，無一輪能獨自轉動。」

translations.en: "What's worse, the motions serve to hold the machine together."
translations.zh: 「更糟的是，這些運動正是維繫整機之力。」

translations.en: "If the gears were still, the whole thing would fall apart! How it was built is quite a mystery."
translations.zh: 「齒輪若靜止，整機便散落！它如何被造出，實是一謎。」

translations.en: ener,fiel,nois,crac
translations.zh: ener,fiel,nois,crac

translations.en: "The field is generated by a curious spell."
translations.zh: 「此場由一道奇異法術所生。」

translations.en: "By some process not yet understood, it converts magical energy into electrical energy, producing a continuous discharge."
translations.zh: 「以某種尚未明的過程，將魔力轉為電力，產生連續的放電。」

translations.en: "If we understood this process better, it would probably lead to all sorts of useful applications."
translations.zh: 「若能更深明此過程，當可帶來諸多有用之應用。」

translations.en: mono
translations.zh: mono

translations.en: "I can't tell you much about that. Lord British donated it to the museum, but I can't get him to talk about it."
translations.zh: 「此事我所知無多。是不列顛王將之捐予博物館，但他不願多談。」

translations.en: "From what little he's said, I think it's an artifact from his home world."
translations.zh: 「依他寥寥數語推之，似是來自他故鄉世界的遺物。」

translations.en: libr,lyca
translations.zh: libr,lyca

translations.en: "There is a great deal of knowledge available there for the serious scholar."
translations.zh: 「彼處對於認真治學者，有大量學問可得。」

translations.en: bye
translations.zh: bye

translations.en: "Be sure to have a look at our paintings while you're here. And come again soon..."
translations.zh: 「來時務必觀賞我們的畫作。歡迎不日再臨…」

translations.en: "We're expecting some unicorn horns, and a Klein bottle from Trinsic."
translations.zh: 「我們正等候些獨角獸角，以及一只來自崔西克的克萊因瓶。」
translations.note: Trinsic→崔西克；Klein bottle→克萊因瓶（拓樸學經典）

translations.en: purr
translations.zh: purr

translations.en: She favors you with a deep, throaty purr that sounds just like a cat.
translations.zh: 她對汝發出一聲低沉、喉間的呼嚕，恰似貓鳴。
translations.note: Kytyn=kitten 諧音；呼嚕貓鳴致敬

translations.en: "I can't help you with that. Try the @library at the Lycaeum."
translations.zh: 「此事我幫不上忙，請去學苑的@library（藏書）閣試試。」

keyword_mapping.@British: @王（內部碼 brit 保留 ASCII）
keyword_mapping.@name: @名字（內部碼 name 保留 ASCII）
keyword_mapping.@job: @職業（內部碼 job 保留 ASCII）
keyword_mapping.@bye: @再見（內部碼 bye 保留 ASCII）
keyword_mapping.@purr: @呼嚕（內部碼 purr 保留 ASCII）

riddles_additions.en: She favors you with a deep, throaty purr that sounds just like a cat.
riddles_additions.zh: 她對汝發出一聲低沉、喉間的呼嚕，恰似貓鳴。
riddles_additions.ref: Kytyn 名稱諧音 kitten（小貓）；當玩家輸入 @purr 時觸發此貓化反應
riddles_additions.strategy: 保留呼嚕貓鳴的肢體語言；中文不可直接諧音音譯但保留意象

riddles_additions.zh: 一只來自崔西克的克萊因瓶
riddles_additions.ref: Klein bottle 是拓樸學經典——只有一面、無內外之別的玻璃瓶；U6 彩蛋

riddles_additions.en: I think it's an artifact from his home world.
riddles_additions.zh: 似是來自他故鄉世界的遺物。
riddles_additions.ref: 暗示 Lord British（英國 Richard Garriott 的角色）來自地球；2001 太空漫遊 monolith 致敬
riddles_additions.strategy: 直譯保留宇宙起源神祕感；home world 明指地球但不點破

translator_notes: Kytyn 是博物館（@oddities 奇珍館）館長，名稱諧音 kitten。她戴左手皮手套是從前訓鷹師職業遺跡。展品列表（offset 1081, len=157）是 keyword hub：@monolith @energy @machine @bones @fountain @dragon 各觸發後續解說。保留 Zog 不譯（U6 設定中遠古生物學名）。Klein bottle 是拓樸學雙關彩蛋。Lord British 之 @British keyword 內部碼 brit 保留 ASCII，但 keyword 觸發後可看到中文『王』。0 OVERFLOW。
